name: Mermail Abyssleed
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水精鱗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マーメイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リードアビス
desc: You can discard 3 other WATER monsters to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. When Summoned this way: You can target 1 "Abyss-" Spell/Trap in your GY; add that target to your hand. You can Tribute 1 other Attack Position "Mermail" monster; send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Mermail Abyssleed" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard 3 other WATER monsters to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. When Summoned this way: You can target 1 "Abyss-" Spell/Trap in your GY; add that target to your hand. You can Tribute 1 other Attack Position "Mermail" monster; send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Mermail Abyssleed" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 3 other WATER monsters to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. When Summoned this way: You can target 1 "Abyss-" Spell/Trap in your GY; add that target to your hand. You can Tribute 1 other Attack Position "Mermail" monster; send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Mermail Abyssleed" once per turn.

action: Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
